learnings.title: HALT-AWAITING-INPUT en decisiones de estado compartido
learnings.description: Detener y pedir decisión explícita antes de tocar settings/protecciones visibles a terceros

learnings.title: No persistir BITACORA hasta SUCCESS verificado
learnings.description: Estado HALT no es SUCCESS; persistir solo cuando verificación física confirme artefactos
learnings.context: Al final de cada ciclo, antes de actualizar BITACORA

learnings.title: Nixpacks buildCommand duplicating npm install causes EBUSY
learnings.description: With builder=NIXPACKS, buildCommand must never include npm ci/install — collides with BuildKit cache mount
learnings.context: Railway services using Nixpacks builder with custom railway.toml buildCommand

learnings.title: Railway frontend/backend config asymmetry
learnings.description: Backend has no railway.toml (Nixpacks auto-detects); frontend has explicit one — manual authoring is the risk surface
learnings.context: When debugging Railway deploy failures, check whether the failing service has explicit railway.toml overrides

learnings.title: main branch protection is now active on AmaCafeDos

learnings.context: Any commit targeting main on AmaCafeDos repo

learnings.context: Every implementation cycle that modifies files

learnings.title: User authorizes PR pattern as fallback when direct-to-main fails
learnings.description: User explicitly allows C123 PR pattern as fallback if direct push is blocked
learnings.context: Commits where user offers 'direct or PR' choice

learnings.description: Must be set in Railway env vars BEFORE redeploy — bundle bakes the value, runtime changes have no effect
learnings.context: Vite frontend deployments needing backend API URL

archivedLearnings.description: Routes that need their own normalization (chat sanitizer, webhook raw-body) must be mounted BEFORE the global guard. This achieves bypass without per-path skip logic.
archivedLearnings.context: Express middleware composition

archivedLearnings.title: NoSQL operators surface as object keys, not values
archivedLearnings.description: Walking only values misses $where/$ne/$gt — Mongo-style smuggling uses keys. Walk MUST inspect both keys and values; same for prototype-pollution markers (__proto__/constructor/prototype).
archivedLearnings.context: Tree-walking validation middleware

archivedLearnings.title: Checkpoint tag before risky deployment
